user.title: Tripp Lite WebcardLX
user.description: Connect to a WebcardLX installed in a supported Tripp Lite UPS.

data_description.url: Use the full local URL, for example https://192.168.1.50.
data_description.allow_unsupported_model: Only enable this while testing a model outside SU1000XLA and SU1500RTXL2U/SU1500RTXL2UA.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Tripp Lite WebcardLX
reauth_confirm.description: Update the credentials used to connect to the WebcardLX.

error.unsupported_model: No supported UPS model was found. Supported models are SU1000XLA, SU1500RTXL2U, and SU1500RTXL2UA.

data_description.allow_unsupported_model: Only enable this while testing a model outside SU1000XLA and SU1500RTXL2U/SU1500RTXL2UA.

execute_load_action.name: Execute load action
execute_load_action.description: Turn on, turn off, or power-cycle targeted UPS load switches. Cycling or turning off a load can interrupt connected equipment.

execute_device_action.name: Execute UPS device action
execute_device_action.description: Execute a UPS power action against targeted UPS devices. Turn off and reboot can interrupt protected equipment.

delay.name: Delay
delay.description: Delay in seconds applied when action-specific delays are not supplied.

turn_on_delay.name: Turn-on delay
turn_on_delay.description: Delay in seconds before the UPS turns on.

turn_off_delay.name: Turn-off delay
turn_off_delay.description: Delay in seconds before the UPS turns off.

acknowledge_alarms.name: Acknowledge alarms
acknowledge_alarms.description: Acknowledge specific active alarm IDs reported by the selected WebcardLX config entry.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: WebcardLX config entry that reported the alarms.

alarm_ids.name: Alarm IDs
alarm_ids.description: List of current WebcardLX alarm IDs to acknowledge.

acknowledge_all_alarms.name: Acknowledge all alarms
acknowledge_all_alarms.description: Acknowledge all active alarms reported by the selected WebcardLX config entry.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: WebcardLX config entry whose alarms should be acknowledged.

set_variable.name: Set variable
set_variable.description: Update targeted editable WebcardLX configuration entities.

value.name: Value
value.description: New value for the targeted variable entity.

tolerance.name: Tolerance
tolerance.description: Optional numeric tolerance accepted by the WebcardLX for the update.

update_device_properties.name: Update device properties
update_device_properties.description: Update editable device metadata on targeted UPS devices.

name.name: Name
name.description: Friendly name stored on the WebcardLX device record.

location.name: Location
location.description: Location metadata stored on the WebcardLX device record.

region.name: Region
region.description: Region metadata stored on the WebcardLX device record.

configured_device_id.name: Configured device ID
configured_device_id.description: Device ID metadata stored on the WebcardLX device record.

configured_asset_tag.name: Configured asset tag
configured_asset_tag.description: Asset tag metadata stored on the WebcardLX device record.

install_date.name: Install date
install_date.description: Installation date metadata stored on the WebcardLX device record.

entry_not_found.message: No configured Tripp Lite WebcardLX entry was found.

entry_required.message: config_entry_id is required when more than one Tripp Lite WebcardLX entry exists.

invalid_target.message: The selected target is not a valid Tripp Lite WebcardLX target for this action.

load_action_not_supported.message: The selected load does not currently support this action.

device_action_not_supported.message: The selected UPS does not currently support this action.

variable_not_editable.message: The selected variable is no longer editable.

invalid_variable_value.message: The value is not valid for the selected variable entity.

invalid_select_option.message: The selected option is not valid for this variable.

alarm_not_found.message: The following alarm IDs are not active on the selected config entry: {alarm_ids}

no_device_properties.message: At least one editable device property must be provided.
